changes.value:
## What
Create an `EntitySearchContext` in the `swissarmyhammer-entity-search` crate that wraps `EntitySearchIndex` with lifecycle management: initialization from all entities, sync via entity events, and embedding caching.

**Files:**
- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/context.rs` (new)
- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/lib.rs` (re-export)

**Approach:**
- `EntitySearchContext` wraps `RwLock<EntitySearchIndex>` + optional `Arc<dyn TextEmbedder>`
- `::new(entities: Vec<Entity>) -> Self` — bulk-load all entities into index on creation
- `.update(entity: Entity)` — update a single entity in index, invalidate its embedding
- `.remove(id: &str)` — remove entity from index, drop its embedding
- `.search(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>` — fuzzy search (sync, fast)
- `.search_hybrid(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>` — hybrid search using cached embeddings
- `.rebuild_embeddings()` — async, rebuilds all embeddings (called on init, then periodically or on-demand)
- `.invalidate_embedding(id: &str)` — marks a single entity's embedding as stale without rebuilding all
- Embeddings are lazily rebuilt: on next hybrid search, stale entries get re-embedded

The context is the single owner of the search index. External code interacts only through the context's API.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] EntitySearchContext can be created from a Vec<Entity>
- [ ] Single-entity update/remove works without rebuilding all embeddings
- [ ] Stale embeddings are tracked and lazily rebuilt
- [ ] Fuzzy search works immediately (no embedding dependency)
- [ ] Thread-safe (RwLock + Send + Sync)

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: create context, search, update entity, search again
- [ ] Unit test: remove entity, verify it's gone from results
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search`
EntitySearchContext: in-memory search context with embedding cache

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,31 +1,30 @@
 ## What
-Create an `EntitySearchContext` in the `swissarmyhammer-entity-search` crate that wraps `EntitySearchIndex` with lifecycle management: initialization from all entities, sync via entity events, and embedding caching.
+Extend `EntitySearchIndex` (not a new wrapper type) to serve as the in-memory search context. It already holds `entities: HashMap<String, Entity>` and `embeddings: Vec<EntityEmbedding>`. Add embedding staleness tracking so individual entity changes invalidate only that entity's embedding, with lazy rebuild.

 **Files:**
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/context.rs` (new)
-- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/lib.rs` (re-export)
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/index.rs` — extend EntitySearchIndex
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/lib.rs` — re-exports

-**Approach:**
-- `EntitySearchContext` wraps `RwLock<EntitySearchIndex>` + optional `Arc<dyn TextEmbedder>`
-- `::new(entities: Vec<Entity>) -> Self` — bulk-load all entities into index on creation
-- `.update(entity: Entity)` — update a single entity in index, invalidate its embedding
-- `.remove(id: &str)` — remove entity from index, drop its embedding
-- `.search(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>` — fuzzy search (sync, fast)
-- `.search_hybrid(query, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>` — hybrid search using cached embeddings
-- `.rebuild_embeddings()` — async, rebuilds all embeddings (called on init, then periodically or on-demand)
-- `.invalidate_embedding(id: &str)` — marks a single entity's embedding as stale without rebuilding all
-- Embeddings are lazily rebuilt: on next hybrid search, stale entries get re-embedded
+**Additions to EntitySearchIndex:**
+- `stale_ids: HashSet<String>` — tracks entities whose embeddings are out of date
+- `.update()` already exists — enhance to also mark the entity's embedding as stale (add id to `stale_ids`)
+- `.remove()` already exists — already clears embeddings, also remove from stale set
+- `.rebuild_stale_embeddings(embedder)` — async, re-embeds only stale entities instead of rebuilding all
+- `.search_hybrid()` already exists — before searching, optionally rebuild stale embeddings (or just fuzzy-fall-back if stale)
+- Bulk init: `::from_entities(entities: Vec<Entity>) -> Self` convenience constructor

-The context is the single owner of the search index. External code interacts only through the context's API.
+The index IS the context — no extra wrapper needed. It's the single object mounted in BoardHandle behind `RwLock<EntitySearchIndex>`.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] EntitySearchContext can be created from a Vec<Entity>
-- [ ] Single-entity update/remove works without rebuilding all embeddings
-- [ ] Stale embeddings are tracked and lazily rebuilt
-- [ ] Fuzzy search works immediately (no embedding dependency)
-- [ ] Thread-safe (RwLock + Send + Sync)
+- [ ] `EntitySearchIndex::from_entities()` bulk-loads entities
+- [ ] `.update()` marks embedding as stale without full rebuild
+- [ ] `.remove()` cleans up both entity and embedding state
+- [ ] `.rebuild_stale_embeddings()` only re-embeds changed entities
+- [ ] Fuzzy search works immediately regardless of embedding state
+- [ ] Thread-safe when wrapped in RwLock (no internal mutexes)

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Unit test: create context, search, update entity, search again
-- [ ] Unit test: remove entity, verify it's gone from results
+- [ ] Unit test: from_entities, search, update entity, search again
+- [ ] Unit test: stale tracking — update marks stale, rebuild clears
+- [ ] Unit test: remove entity clears from stale set too
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search`
\ No newline at end of file
